description: Michael Peterson and his son Ace are outside a toy shop when an explosion rocks the building behind them. Acting quickly, Mike displays superhuman abilities: he scales a brick wall, leaps, and saves a woman, while his son and a bystander watch. Skye records the entire event with her phone, clearly intrigued by what she sees.

transcript.line: The secret is out. For decades, your organization stayed in the shadows. Hiding the truth. But now we know — they're among us. Heroes... and monsters. The world is full of wonders.
Ace, come and get it. What do you say we go out to your Aunt Mindy's this weekend? You and Kisha can swim in the pond.
You know, you got a birthday coming up in a couple of months. Who's your favorite?
Hey. Things are tight right now, but I'm gonna find something. Not back at the factory, but I got prospects. You and me... what are we?
That's right. So, who do you...
Are you okay? All right, Ace, look at me. I need you to stay here with Bernie, okay? People might be hurt, and I'm gonna see if they need my help. Stay with Bernie. Watch my boy!
We can't explain everything we see. But our eyes are open. So what now? There are no more shadows for you to hide in. Something impossible just happened. What are you going to do about it?
